mapper.select: SELECT ID AS id, PAYMENT_ORDER_ID AS paymentOrderId, PAYMENT_KEY AS paymentKey, PAYMENT_AMOUNT AS paymentAmount, PAYMENT_STATUS AS paymentStatus, PAYMENT_METHOD AS paymentMethod, PAYMENT_AT AS paymentAt, PAYMENT_TYPE AS paymentType, REFERENCE_ID AS referenceId, USER_ID AS userId FROM TBL_PAYMENT WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} ORDER BY PAYMENT_AT DESC

SELECT ID AS id, PAYMENT_ORDER_ID AS paymentOrderId, PAYMENT_KEY AS paymentKey, PAYMENT_AMOUNT AS paymentAmount, PAYMENT_STATUS AS paymentStatus, PAYMENT_METHOD AS paymentMethod, PAYMENT_AT AS paymentAt, PAYMENT_TYPE AS paymentType, REFERENCE_ID AS referenceId, USER_ID AS userId FROM TBL_PAYMENT WHERE PAYMENT_ORDER_ID = #{orderId}
